note: Legacy equipment is a single text field; current actors split it into equipment items. Legacy descriptor array includes gift descriptors and the Dark Ego descriptor; current actors keep main background plus those descriptors as descriptor items.

acceptedCorrections.name: Cunning Machiavelli the Fox and Sly Bischeri the Cat
acceptedCorrections.reason: The first GitHub JSON has 4 total descriptors when counting background, but the PDF/user-corrected model requires 5: one main descriptor, one descriptor for each of 3 gifts, and one Dark Ego descriptor.
